media.title: Pacers guarantee Quenton Jackson's contract for 2026-27 season; what it means
media.description: Pacers G Quenton Jackson could have been waived up until Wednesday and paid just $275,000, but the Pacers are guaranteeing his contract for 2026-27.

items.title: Also, another deal that shows the value of what little move *can* become. Pacers were able to sign Quenton Jackson to a two-way deal in 2024 because they gave Kendall Brown a standard deal and opened a two-way slot. Another chance to look at a young player, and he's still around.
items.author: Tony East
items.body_excerpt: Also, another deal that shows the value of what little move *can* become. Pacers were able to sign Quenton Jackson to a two-way deal in 2024 because they gave Kendall Brown a standard deal and opened a two-way slot. Another chance to look at a young player, and he's still around.

items.title: Pacers To Guarantee Quenton Jackson’s 2026/27 Salary
items.author: Hoops Rumors
items.body_excerpt: Pacers To Guarantee Quenton Jackson’s 2026/27 Salary Hoops Rumors

items.title: The Pacers are guaranteeing Quenton Jackson’s contract, I’m told. He will not be waived today. His $2.58m contract will be fully guaranteed for the coming season. He only had $275k guaranteed had he been waived today (or sooner).
items.author: Tony East
items.body_excerpt: The Pacers are guaranteeing Quenton Jackson’s contract, I’m told. He will not be waived today. His $2.58m contract will be fully guaranteed for the coming season. He only had $275k guaranteed had he been waived today (or sooner).

items.title: And now welcome Obi Toppin, Ben Sheppard, and Quenton Jackson to the mix.
items.author: Tony East

items.title: Spilled too much ink on the next steps for the Pacers here. More concise: They can't fit in Nance under the first apron without either A) signing him to an Exhibit 10 deal or B) waiving either Micah Potter or Quenton Jackson. Looking for the clarity.
items.author: Tony East
